assertions.assertion: Configures both AddJwtBearer and AddOAuth2Introspection handlers
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md shows both handlers in combined section.

assertions.assertion: Uses ForwardReferenceToken (via Selector.ForwardReferenceToken) to route reference tokens to the introspection handler
The scheme name passed to ForwardReferenceToken matches the scheme name used in AddOAuth2Introspection
Sets ValidTypes to include 'at+jwt' on the JWT bearer handler
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md includes ValidTypes in combined example.
SKILL.md shows the package for ForwardReferenceToken.
